locations.name: George Ernest Shelley
locations.summary: Captain George Ernest Shelley (15 May 1840 – 29 November 1910) was an English geologist and ornithologist.

relations.subject: Bronze sunbird
relations.evidence: The bronze sunbird (Nectarinia kilimensis) is a species of bird in the family Nectariniidae. It is native to the Bié Plateau (Angola) and eastern Afromontane forests
